title: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
content: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

title: Lemurian Labs Raises $28 Million For AI Portability Software
content: GPU kernels are a faulty abstraction, Dawani said, because they are generally oriented around optimizing the compute pipeline rather than optimizing for memory bandwidth, a common bottleneck in state-of-the-art AI systems. Kernels also do not solve the portability problem, since by default they are hardware- and workload-specific. 'In fact, if you write a good kernel today, it makes your hardware look worse,' he said. 'You're exposing the latency of your system when the job is to hide the latency. If you push a compute pipeline to the limit, you're making memory bandwidth and everything else look worse, because you can't get data in and out fast enough.'
author: EE Times

title: Technology is lust removed from nature.
content: Technology is lust removed from nature. The more advanced the systems, the more primitive the fear.
author: Don DeLillo

title: UntetherAI is Acquired by AMD
content: Dear Untether AI Customers and Partners, Untether AI Corp. has entered into a transaction with AMD. As a result of the transaction, Untether AI will no longer be supplying or supporting our speedAI® products and imAIgine® Software Development Kit (SDK). While today marks the end of Untether AI's journey, we are proud of the pioneering research that underpinned our work in advancing state-of-the-art AI chip technology. We are grateful for the dedication of our team and the support of our customers, partners, and investors. We look forward to the contributions our world-class team will make with AMD. Thank you for your partnership and trust throughout our journey together. Sincerely, UntetherAI
author: UntetherAI in a letter to customers

title: America, oh how it hurts.
content: Man, I am so jealous of how chill Canada is. It's like they can live and they can work, and it doesn't have to hurt.
author: James Rouleau
